samples.text: All mountains are landforms. Clouds are not landforms. Are clouds mountains?
Every mountain belongs to the category of landforms. Clouds do not belong to the category of landforms. Does that make clouds mountains?
All elevated geological structures are terrain features. Clouds are not terrain features. Are clouds elevated geological structures?
Clouds exist in the atmosphere and are composed of water vapor. Mountains are solid landforms fixed to the ground. Are clouds mountains?
All mountains are landforms. Clouds are not landforms. Some mountains have snow on their peaks. Are clouds mountains?
